package main

import (
	"bytes"
	"context"
	"fmt"
	"os"
	"path/filepath"
	"testing"

	"github.com/aquasecurity/trivy/pkg/fanal/analyzer"
	"golang.org/x/xerrors"
)

// TestRegression tests the known library scanner failures
func TestRegression(t *testing.T) {
	t.Run("TrivyDBClientInitializationFailure", testTrivyDBClientInit)
	t.Run("PnpmEcosystemNotDetected", testPnpmEcosystemMissing)
	t.Run("DotnetEcosystemNotDetected", testDotnetEcosystemMissing)
	t.Run("StaleOSAnalyzerImport", testStaleOSAnalyzerImport)
	t.Run("NonApplicationAnalyzersRunning", testNonApplicationAnalyzersScope)
}

// getDisabledAnalyzersForLibraryScan simulates the list from scanner/base.go AnalyzeLibraries function
func getDisabledAnalyzersForLibraryScan() []string {
	// Simulate the list from scanner/base.go AnalyzeLibraries function
	return []string{
		"TypeOSRelease",
		"TypeAlpine",
		"TypeAmazon",
		"TypeCBLMariner",
		"TypeDebian",
		"TypePhoton",
		"TypeCentOS",
		"TypeRocky",
		"TypeAlma",
		"TypeFedora",

		"TypeRedHatBase",

		"TypeDockerfile",

		"TypeCloudFormation",
		"TypeHelm",
		"TypeLicenseFile",
		"TypeSecret",
		"TypeRedHatContentManifestType",
		"TypeRedHatDockerfileType",
	}
}
